message.content:
@startuml
title Capture Credit Card Payment

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Shop" as Shop
database PAYONE

== Initial Setup ==
Client ->> Shop : POST prepare.php\n302 capture.php
activate Shop
deactivate Shop
Client ->> Shop : GET capture.php
activate Shop


alt [No Pseudo Card PAN present] 
    activate Payone
    
    return 200 Credit Card Form 
    
    deactivate Shop
    
    Client->PAYONE:POST Card PAN
    activate PAYONE
    return 200 Pseudo Card PAN
    deactivate PAYONE
    
    
    Client ->> Shop : POST capture.php
    activate Shop
end



opt With 3-D Secure 

    
   alt No 3-D Secure
   
       opt some time later
        
        end
        
        
       
   
else Some other condition
  
  
  

  


endif




@enduml
